Interface IuRedisConfiguration

public interface IuRedisConfiguration
Redis configuration interface.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getHost()
    Returns the host to be used for Redis connection.
    default Duration
    getKeyExpiration()
    Returns the key expiration duration.
    String
    getPassword()
    Returns the password to be used for HTTP Basic authentication.
    String
    getPort()
    Returns the port to be used for Redis connection.
    default boolean
    getSsl()
    Connecting to Redis Cluster with SSL enabled.
    String
    getUsername()
    Returns the username to be used for HTTP Basic authentication.

  • Method Details

    • getUsername

      String getUsername()
      Returns the username to be used for HTTP Basic authentication.
      Returns:
      the username

    • getPassword

      String getPassword()
      Returns the password to be used for HTTP Basic authentication.
      Returns:
      the password

    • getHost

      String getHost()
      Returns the host to be used for Redis connection.
      Returns:
      the host

    • getPort

      String getPort()
      Returns the port to be used for Redis connection.
      Returns:
      the port

    • getSsl

      default boolean getSsl()
      Connecting to Redis Cluster with SSL enabled.
      Returns:
      true if SSL is enabled otherwise

    • getKeyExpiration

      default Duration getKeyExpiration()
      Returns the key expiration duration.
      Returns:
      the key expiration duration, default is 15 minutes
